commands.review_summary:
The PR extracts Gateway protocol sources into private `packages/gateway-protocol` and Gateway client/runtime helpers into private `packages/gateway-client`, while keeping `src/gateway/client.ts` as an OpenClaw wrapper and updating build, tests, docs, CI, labeler, CODEOWNERS, and lockfile importers.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the merge ref shows the package client only recognizes `fe80:` for IPv6 link-local WebSocket safety, while current main tests cover `fe9a::1` and `febb::1` as accepted private/link-local addresses.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can fix the IPv6 parity and missing automation scopes, but final package-boundary acceptance still belongs to maintainers because the PR carries a protected maintainer label and broad Gateway refactor risk.
